Return to shop 0 Cart No products in the cart. Return to shop HELP CENTER Frequently Asked Questions Quick answers about ordering, customization, shipping, returns, and made-to-order fan gear. Ordering How do I place an order? Choose your league, select a product, customize it if available, then complete checkout. We start production after your order is confirmed. Do I need an account to order? No. You can checkout as a guest and still receive order updates by email. Can I change my order after checkout? You can request changes within 12 hours after purchase. Once production starts, changes may no longer be possible. Customization Can I add my name or number? Yes, selected products allow custom name, number, or personal details. Please review your customization carefully before checkout. Will the final product look exactly like the preview? We aim to match the preview as closely as possible. Minor color differences may occur due to screen settings and production materials. Shipping How long does delivery take? Most orders are delivered within 7–12 business days, including production and shipping time. Do you offer free shipping? Yes. We offer free shipping on orders over $99. Will I receive tracking? Yes. Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking link by email. Returns & Refunds Can I return a made-to-order item? Because each item is made after purchase, we do not accept returns for change of mind, incorrect size choice, or personal preference. What if my item has a defect? If there is a confirmed manufacturing or design issue, we will offer a replacement or refund. How soon should I report a problem? Please contact us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and clear photos of the issue. STILL NEED HELP? Contact our support team Send us your order number and question. We’ll help you as quickly as possible. CONTACT SUPPORT → PITCHSIDE WEAR Fan merchandise for NLL, EPL, and OHL. Made to order, no inventory, nationwide delivery in 7–12 days.
